title: Stat Scaler
description: StatScaler lets you adjust player and entity attributes with multipliers.
body:
## **Overview**
StatScaler allows you to customize the difficulty of your Minecraft experience by adjusting player and entity attributes such as:
- Max Health
- Attack Damage
- Move Speed
- Armor Point
- etc..

You can increase or decrease the difficulty by setting these attributes to custom multipliers. 

How to Configure
1. Install the Mod and launch Minecraft once to generate the configuration file.
1. Open the configuration file located in: "config/StatScaler Config File.toml".
1. Adjust the multipliers for various attributes:
1. Save the file and restart the game for the changes to take effect.
## **Important Notes**

**Game Restart Required**:
Any changes made to the configuration file **require a game restart** to apply.
